title: Memory upgrade regression coverage for checkpoints, quotes, layers, and temporal KG

categories.prompt: What exact words did we use about never mutating the production DB directly?
Why did we choose the runtime-native checkpoint path instead of external hooks?
What did the assistant actually say after the compaction warning?
What workspace preference do we have for archive injection, and why?
Who owned the deployment pipeline before and after the migration on April 7, 2026?
After compaction, continue the memory upgrade task without losing the checkpoint design details.

notes: Internal-only corpus scaffold for the memory upgrade plan. Populate concrete task IDs and transcript references before using this as a gate in CI.
